'''yalaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oolitic|oolitic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oolitic|oolitic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yalaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælæbæth|yælæbæth]] || [[word:yælæbæj|yælæbæj]] || [[word:yælæbæsh|yælæbæsh]] || [[word:yælæbæ|yælæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalalabath|yalalabath]] || [[word:yalalabaj|yalalabaj]] || [[word:yalalabash|yalalabash]] || [[word:yalalaba|yalalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yalabath|yalabath]] || [[word:yalabaj|yalabaj]] || [[word:yalabash|yalabash]] || [[word:yalaba|yalaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalafbath|yalafbath]] || [[word:yalafbaj|yalafbaj]] || [[word:yalafbash|yalafbash]] || [[word:yalafbaf|yalafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yalabatha|yalabatha]] || [[word:yalabaja|yalabaja]] || [[word:yalabasha|yalabasha]] || [[word:yalabaka|yalabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yalabath|yalabath]] || [[word:yalabaj|yalabaj]] || [[word:yalabash|yalabash]] || [[word:yalaba|yalaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yalabathal|yalabathal]] || [[word:yalabajal|yalabajal]] || [[word:yalabashal|yalabashal]] || [[word:yalabakal|yalabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yalabathatha|yalabathatha]] || [[word:yalabajaja|yalabajaja]] || [[word:yalabashasha|yalabashasha]] || [[word:yalabaka|yalabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yalabathan|yalabathan]] || [[word:yalabajan|yalabajan]] || [[word:yalabashan|yalabashan]] || [[word:yalabakan|yalabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yalabathaoro|yalabathaoro]] || [[word:yalabajaoro|yalabajaoro]] || [[word:yalabashaoro|yalabashaoro]] || [[word:yalabakaoro|yalabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
